task_completion.description: Verify that both the 'dwanko_run' animation and the 'city_background' image are loaded into the OpenToonz project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz Xsheet, Timeline, or Level Strip shows columns/layers for both the dwanko animation and the city background image.

task_completion.description: Verify that the output or camera resolution is set to 1920x1080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Camera Settings or Output Settings dialog in OpenToonz displays a width of 1920 and a height of 1080.

task_completion.description: Verify that the city background covers the entire screen/camera view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the synthetic city skyline (rectangles and stars) fills the entire camera bounding box without leaving empty margins.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'dwanko' animation is scaled down and positioned in the top-right quadrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the dwanko character is visibly smaller (about 40-50% of its original relative size) and is located in the upper-right section of the camera view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bottom-left quadrant of the layout remains clear of the animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the bottom-left section of the camera view shows only the city background, with no part of the dwanko animation overlapping it.

task_completion.description: Verify that the render settings are configured to output PNG files to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the save path as '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/news_pip/' (or similar relative path) and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 24 frames have been rendered as PNG files to the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the contents of '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/news_pip/' containing a sequence of at least 24 .png files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to composite the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenToonz application open with active manipulation of the scene, rather than just terminal commands or Python scripts bypassing the software.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the provided synthetic background image rather than downloading a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background image visible in OpenToonz and the final renders must be the synthetic skyline consisting of drawn rectangles and stars, not a real photograph of Cincinnati.

integrity.description: Verify that the rendered output files match the composited scene in OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The thumbnails or opened rendered PNG files in the output directory should visually match the Picture-in-Picture layout constructed in the OpenToonz viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The background image '/home/ga/Documents/TaskData/city_background.jpg' is a synthetic city skyline consisting of random rectangles and stars (due to a broken download URL in the setup). The output resolution must be exactly 1920x1080. The rendered output must consist of at least 24 PNG files located in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/news_pip'. The top-right quadrant of the output should contain the scaled-down animation, while the bottom-left quadrant must be clear and show only the background.
